title: DOCTRINE-MANIFEST
description: Per-consumer-repo declaration of which upstream flywheel doctrine docs this repo wants tracked. Authored under bead flywheel-k8pee as part of the doctrine-pull-ownership-inversion. Carrier: /flywheel:sync-doctrine.

version.description: Schema version. Pin to 'v1' for current consumers.

tracked_doctrines.description: List of doctrine doc filenames (relative to upstream .flywheel/doctrine/) this repo wants synced. Empty array = track nothing; absent manifest = track ALL upstream doctrine.

last_sync_ts.description: ISO8601 timestamp of the most recent --apply run.

last_sync_sha.description: Aggregate sha256 (sorted per-file shas concatenated, hashed) at last successful --apply. Used by /flywheel:status doctrine-staleness dashboard.

pin_policy.description: latest = always pull upstream HEAD; pinned_sha = only accept upstream when its aggregate sha matches pinned_sha below.

pinned_sha.description: Required when pin_policy = pinned_sha. Aggregate sha of accepted upstream snapshot.

consumer_overrides_dir.description: Path (repo-relative) where this consumer keeps per-consumer doctrine annotations. Files here are NEVER overwritten by --apply. Default: .flywheel/doctrine-overrides/

notes.description: Free-form operator notes about why certain doctrines are or aren't tracked.
